may 2010 final thesis project a robust low-cost eye tracking system was developed during the thesis. the obtained method is able to estimate gaze using a simple low-cost web camera in challenging scenarios, such as outdoor. the work involved computer vision and image processing concepts as well as real-time data transmission foundations. at present, am writing two research journal papers about this work (estimated date of publication: january 2011) and the complete method is patent pending (est. 2011). it university of copenhagen (denmark) a (ects grade) 10 out of 10 (spanish grade). september 2003 -
